title: Short Descriptive Question Title
stem: Write a focused single-best-answer clinical or systems question stem here. Include only the information needed to answer the question.
rationale: Explain why the correct answer is best. Briefly explain why each distractor is less appropriate. Keep this source-grounded and useful for learner remediation.
citation: Author or organization. Source title. Year; page/table/section/URL/DOI locator.
